Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.icdmap

Class MapGroup

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.icdmap.MapGroup
  • public class MapGroup
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides SNOMED CT to ICD-10 mapping details for a group. Group has details of map target ICD-10 code and list of advices.
    See Also:
    MapAdvice

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      MapGroup()
      Default constructor.
      MapGroup​(java.lang.String mappedICDCode, java.util.List<MapAdvice> mapAdvices)
      Parameterized constructor.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addMapAdvice​(MapAdvice mapAdvice)
      Adds a new advice to list of advices.

      Returns the list of map advice.
      java.lang.String getMappedICDCode()
      Returns the mapped ICD-10 code.
      void setMapAdvices​(java.util.List<MapAdvice> mapAdvices)
      Sets the list of map advice.
      void setMappedICDCode​(java.lang.String mapTarget)
      Sets the mapped ICD-10 code.

      • MapGroup
